title: Your Tendon Doesn't Need Rest. It Needs a Fight.
description: Chronic tendon pain affects tens of millions of people, and most of them are being told to do the one thing that makes it worse: rest. This piece explains why 'tendinitis' is a misnomer, why the RICE protocol fails chronic tendon injuries, and what the evidence actually says about loading, PRP injections, and targeted nutrition for tendon repair.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Your Tendon Doesn't Need Rest. It Needs a Fight.
